title: Entanglement Distillation
description: Learn protocols for purifying noisy entanglement into high-quality Bell pairs. Understand BBPSSW and DEJMPS protocols, distillation rates, and the connection to quantum error correction.
learningObjectives: Explain the need for entanglement distillation in realistic scenarios
Implement the BBPSSW two-copy distillation protocol
Analyze the DEJMPS recurrence protocol for higher yields
Connect distillation to quantum error correction codes
Understand one-way vs two-way distillation protocols
